text:
MME_TYPE_CD_MM. The hierarchy (and definition of the 
MME_TYPE_CD) is: 

Full dual (MME_TYPE_CD = 4) — the MBSF DUAL_STUS_CD_MM in ('02' '04' '08'); 

Partial dual (MME_TYPE_CD = 3) — the MBSF DUAL_STUS_CD_MM in ('01' '03' '05' '06'); 

Medicare only (MME_TYPE_CD = 2) — the MBSF DUAL_STUS_CD_MM = '00' '09' 'N/A' 'NA' 
'99' and MDCR_BUY_IN in ('1' '2' '3' 'A' 'B' 'C') then (Medicare Only); or else if 

Medicaid only A/B/D (MME_TYPE_CD = 1) — the T-MSIS DE File ELIGBLTY_GRP_CD_MM IN 
('11' '12'
